messages.content:
## Known Facts
- Tool: GetTableContents
Description: [read-only] Retrieve contents of an ABAP table.
Schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"table_name":{"type":"string","description":"Name of the ABAP table"},"max_rows":{"description":"Maximum number of rows to retrieve","type":"number"}},"required":["table_name"],"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#"}
- Tool: CreateStructure
Description: Create a new ABAP structure in SAP system with fields and type references. Includes create, activate, and verify steps.
Schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"structure_name":{"type":"string","description":"Structure name (e.g., ZZ_S_TEST_001). Must follow SAP naming conventions."},"description":{"description":"Structure description. If not provided, structure_name will be used.","type":"string"},"package_name":{"type":"string","description":"Package name (e.g., ZOK_LOCAL, $TMP for local objects)"},"transport_request":{"description":"Transport request number (e.g., E19K905635). Required for transportable packages.","type":"string"},"fields":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string","description":"Field name (e.g., CLIENT, MATERIAL_ID)"},"data_type":{"description":"Data type: CHAR, NUMC, DATS, TIMS, DEC, INT1, INT2, INT4, INT8, CURR, QUAN, etc.","type":"string"},"length":{"description":"Field length","type":"number"},"decimals":{"description":"Decimal places (for DEC, CURR, QUAN types)","default":0,"type":"number"},"domain":{"description":"Domain name for type reference (optional)","type":"string"},"data_element":{"description":"Data element name for type reference (optional)","type":"string"},"structure_ref":{"description":"Include another structure (optional)","type":"string"},"table_ref":{"description":"Reference to table type (optional)","type":"string"},"description":{"description":"Field description","type":"string"}},"required":["name"]},"description":"Array of structure fields"},"includes":{"description":"Include other structures in this structure","type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string","description":"Include structure name"},"suffix":{"description":"Optional suffix for include fields","type":"string"}},"required":["name"]}},"activate":{"description":"Activate structure after creation. Default: true. Set to false for batch operations (activate multiple objects later).","type":"boolean"}},"required":["structure_name","package_name","fields"],"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#"}
- Tool: GetTable
Description: Retrieve ABAP table definition. Supports reading active or inactive version.
Schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"table_name":{"type":"string","description":"Table name (e.g., Z_MY_TABLE)."},"version":{"description":"Version to read: \"active\" (default) for deployed version, \"inactive\" for modified but not activated version.","default":"active","type":"string","enum":["active","inactive"]}},"required":["table_name"],"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#"}
- Tool: GetStructure
Description: Retrieve ABAP structure definition. Supports reading active or inactive version.
Schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"structure_name":{"type":"string","description":"Structure name (e.g., Z_MY_STRUCTURE)."},"version":{"description":"Version to read: \"active\" (default) for deployed version, \"inactive\" for modified but not activated version.","default":"active","type":"string","enum":["active","inactive"]}},"required":["structure_name"],"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#"}
- Tool: CreateTable
Description: Create a new ABAP table via the ADT API using provided DDL. Mirrors Eclipse ADT behaviour with status/check runs, lock handling, activation and verification.
Schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"table_name":{"type":"string","description":"Table name (e.g., ZZ_TEST_TABLE_001). Must follow SAP naming conventions."},"ddl_code":{"type":"string","description":"Complete DDL code for table creation. Example: '@EndUserText.label : \\'My Table\\' @AbapCatalog.tableCategory : #TRANSPARENT define table ztst_table { key client : abap.clnt not null; key id : abap.char(10); name : abap.char(255); }'"},"description":{"description":"Table description for validation and creation.","type":"string"},"package_name":{"type":"string","description":"Package name (e.g., ZOK_LOCAL, $TMP for local objects)"},"transport_request":{"description":"Transport request number (e.g., E19K905635). Required for transportable packages.","type":"string"},"activate":{"description":"Activate table after creation. Default: true. Set to false for batch operations (activate multiple objects later).","type":"boolean"}},"required":["table_name","ddl_code","package_name"],"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#"}
- Tool: DeleteStructure
Description: Delete an ABAP structure from the SAP system. Includes deletion check before actual deletion. Transport request optional for $TMP objects.
Schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"structure_name":{"type":"string","description":"Structure name (e.g., Z_MY_STRUCTURE)."},"transport_request":{"description":"Transport request number (e.g., E19K905635). Required for transportable objects. Optional for local objects ($TMP).","type":"string"}},"required":["structure_name"],"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#"}
- Tool: UpdateTable
Description: Update DDL source code of an existing ABAP table. Locks the table, uploads new DDL source, and unlocks. Optionally activates after update. Use this to modify existing tables without re-creating metadata.
Schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"table_name":{"type":"string","description":"Table name (e.g., ZZ_TEST_TABLE_001). Table must already exist."},"ddl_code":{"type":"string","description":"Complete DDL source code for table. Example: '@EndUserText.label : \\'My Table\\' @AbapCatalog.tableCategory : #TRANSPARENT define table ztst_table { key client : abap.clnt not null; key id : abap.char(10); name : abap.char(255); }'"},"transport_request":{"description":"Transport request number (e.g., E19K905635). Optional if object is local or already in transport.","type":"string"},"activate":{"description":"Activate table after source update. Default: true.","type":"boolean"}},"required":["table_name","ddl_code"],"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#"}
- Tool: UpdateStructure
Description: Update DDL source code of an existing ABAP structure. Locks the structure, uploads new DDL source, and unlocks. Optionally activates after update. Use this to modify existing structures without re-creating metadata.
Schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"structure_name":{"type":"string","description":"Structure name (e.g., ZZ_S_TEST_001). Structure must already exist."},"ddl_code":{"type":"string","description":"Complete DDL source code for structure. Example: '@EndUserText.label : \\'My Structure\\' @AbapCatalog.tableCategory : #TRANSPARENT define structure zz_s_test_001 { client : abap.clnt not null; id : abap.char(10); name : abap.char(255); }'"},"transport_request":{"description":"Transport request number (e.g., E19K905635). Optional if object is local or already in transport.","type":"string"},"activate":{"description":"Activate structure after source update. Default: true.","type":"boolean"}},"required":["structure_name","ddl_code"],"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#"}
- Tool: GetTypeInfo
Description: [read-only] Retrieve ABAP type information.
Schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"type_name":{"type":"string","description":"Name of the ABAP type"},"include_structure_fallback":{"description":"When true (default), tries DDIC structure lookup only if type lookup returns 404/empty.","default":true,"type":"boolean"}},"required":["type_name"],"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#"}
- Tool: DescribeByList
Description: [read-only] Batch description for a list of ABAP objects. Input: objects: Array<{ name: string, type?: string }>. Each object may be of type: PROG/P, FUGR, PROG/I, CLAS/OC, FUGR/FC, INTF/OI, TABLE, STRUCTURE, etc.
Schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"objects":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"description":"[read-only] Object name (required, must be valid ABAP object name or mask)","type":"string"},"type":{"description":"[read-only] Optional type (e.g. PROG/P, CLAS/OC, etc.)","type":"string"}}}}},"required":["objects"],"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#"}

## Available Tools
- GetTableContents: [read-only] Retrieve contents of an ABAP table.
- GetTypeInfo: [read-only] Retrieve ABAP type information.
- DescribeByList: [read-only] Batch description for a list of ABAP objects. Input: objects: Array<{ name: string, type?: string }>. Each object may be of type: PROG/P, FUGR, PROG/I, CLAS/OC, FUGR/FC, INTF/OI, TABLE, STRUCTURE, etc.
- CreateTable: Create a new ABAP table via the ADT API using provided DDL. Mirrors Eclipse ADT behaviour with status/check runs, lock handling, activation and verification.
- GetTable: Retrieve ABAP table definition. Supports reading active or inactive version.
- UpdateTable: Update DDL source code of an existing ABAP table. Locks the table, uploads new DDL source, and unlocks. Optionally activates after update. Use this to modify existing tables without re-creating metadata.
- CreateStructure: Create a new ABAP structure in SAP system with fields and type references. Includes create, activate, and verify steps.
- GetStructure: Retrieve ABAP structure definition. Supports reading active or inactive version.
- UpdateStructure: Update DDL source code of an existing ABAP structure. Locks the structure, uploads new DDL source, and unlocks. Optionally activates after update. Use this to modify existing structures without re-creating metadata.
- DeleteStructure: Delete an ABAP structure from the SAP system. Includes deletion check before actual deletion. Transport request optional for $TMP objects.

<info-msg>
It is currently 2026-02-25 11:01:00
Working directory: /home/okyslytsia/prj/issues

ALWAYS batch multiple tool operations into ONE execute_code call.
- WRONG: Separate execute_code calls for read file, then write file
- RIGHT: One execute_code with a script that reads AND writes

Modules: apps, extensionmanager, skills, todo

Use the read_module tool to see signatures before calling unfamiliar tools.

Current tasks and notes:
Once given a task, immediately update your todo with all explicit and implicit requirements

</info-msg>
Прочитай структуру таблиці T002. склади 5 та 9.
Я прочитаю структуру таблиці T002 та складемо таблиці 5 та 9. Спочатку перевірю, що це за таблиця.

[{"type":"text","text":"{
  "success": true,
  "table_name": "T002",
  "version": "active",
  "table_data": "@EndUserText.label : 'Language Keys (Component BC-I18)'\n@AbapCatalog.enhancement.category : #NOT_EXTENSIBLE\n@AbapCatalog.tableCategory : #TRANSPARENT\n@AbapCatalog.deliveryClass : #S\n@AbapCatalog.dataMaintenance : #RESTRICTED\ndefine table t002 {\n\n  key spras : spras not null;\n  laspez    : laspez not null;\n  lahq      : lahq;\n  laiso     : laiso;\n\n}",
  "status": 200,
  "status_text": "OK"
}"}]
Тепер отримаю вміст таблиці T002, щоб побачити дані:
[{"type":"text","text":"MCP error -32603: GetTableContents is temporarily unavailable. Method will be added to AdtClient soon."}]
Спробую отримати інформацію про тип даних таблиці T002:
[{"type":"text","text":"MCP error -32603: ADT error: AxiosError: Request failed with status code 422"}]
Давайте спробуємо отримати опис таблиці T002 через DescribeByList:
